name: Eggplant Preserve (Melitzanaki Gliko)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the eggplants and trim them.
2. Cut into walnut-sized pieces.
3. Cover with water and the juice of 1 lemon; soak for an hour.
4. Boil until just tender (about 10 minutes), then remove and drain.
5. Push one almond into each eggplant piece.
6. In a preserving pan, heat sugar and water, then add the eggplants.
7. Heat gently for 10 minutes. Leave in syrup overnight.
8. The next day, reheat the syrup and add the remaining ingredients, including the juice of the second lemon.
9. Gently simmer until the setting point is reached.
10. Test for readiness as usual, then pack into hot jars.
11. Seal and allow to cool before storing in a cool place.
